backupCodeInstructions: Enter one of your backup codes (format: XXXX-XXXX)
enterToken: Enter the token from your email
passwordRules: Min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, 1 special char (@$!%*?&)
verifyEmailInstructions: We've sent a verification link to your email. Enter the verification code below to confirm your email address.
emailVerifiedSuccess: Email verified successfully! Two-factor authentication has been enabled; you will be prompted to enter a code on your next login. Redirecting to dashboard...
passwordResetSent: Password reset link sent to your email. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login page...
passwordRulesText: Min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, 1 special char (@$!%*?&)
twoFADisabled: Disabled - Add an extra layer of security
twoFADescription1: Two-Factor Authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account. You'll need an authenticator app like Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator.
openAuthenticatorApp: Open your authenticator app and scan this QR code:
cantScanEnterKeyManually: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
enterSixDigitCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify:
authenticatorAppSetup: Your authenticator app is now set up. Save your backup codes in a safe place.
backupCodesWarningText: These backup codes are the only way to recover your account if you lose access to your authenticator app. Each code can be used once. Store them safely.
invalidVerificationCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
